query: Apple most recent annual revenue 2025 annual report revenue 2025
answer: Apple's 2025 annual revenue was $416.2 billion, a record high and a 6% increase from 2024, driven by strong iPhone and Services sales. This figure aligns with reports of a 6.43% rise from 2024's $391.035 billion.

results.title: Apple Revenue 2012-2025 | AAPL - Macrotrends
results.snippet: Apple annual revenue for 2025 was $416.161B, a 6.43% increase from 2024. Apple annual revenue for 2024 was $391.035B, a 2.02% increase from 2023.

results.title: Apple net income FY 2025 - Statista
results.snippet: Apple reported a net income of 112 billion U.S. dollars in its 2025 fiscal year, up from the highest net income to date in 2022.
